title: Ebony Blade
description:
A Sword called Ebony Blade!
Can be obtained by renaming a diamond or netherite sword to 
"Ebony Blade"
body:
A Sword called Ebony Blade! Can be obtained by renaming s diamond or netherite sword to "**Ebony Blade**"

**THIS MOD IS REQUIRED FOR TEXTURPACK TO WORK:**

[CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)
